comment:
## Changes requested — review is premature

This issue was moved to `in_review` immediately after the audit + delegation, but none of the deliverable work exists yet. There is nothing for me to review.

### Current child state

- [ZAI-140](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-140) Dashboard — `in_progress` (Localization Agent)
- [ZAI-141](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-141) Issue properties — `in_progress` (Localization Agent)
- [ZAI-142](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-142) Inbox filters — `in_progress` (Localization Agent)
- [ZAI-143](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-143) Activity feed — `in_progress` (Localization Agent)
- [ZAI-144](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-144) Formatters — `in_progress` (Localization Agent)
- [ZAI-145](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-145) Browser Tester sweep — `blocked` on the five above

Acceptance criteria 5 (zero English text across 8 locales with screenshot evidence) and 6 (translations in all 8 locale files) cannot be evaluated until those children complete and the Browser Tester sweep produces clean results.

### What I need before this comes back to review

1. ZAI-140 through ZAI-144 all `done`.
2. ZAI-145 Browser Tester sweep produces zero-English screenshot evidence in **all 8 locales** (en, ru, de, es, fr, it, pt, zh) across dashboard, issue detail, inbox, costs, activity, agents, settings, and command palette. Screenshots attached to ZAI-145 or this issue.
3. CTO has personally spot-checked the Russian sweep against the original board-flagged strings (Agents, Finished 1d ago, Critical/High/Medium/Low, In Review, Properties, Medium, May 6 2026, 1d ago, All/Active/Backlog/Done, In Progress/Todo/Backlog/In Review/Blocked/Done/Cancelled, Live runs only, access_roles.board, activity feed verb phrases) — and confirmed each one is actually translated.
4. **Do not request merge of `vib-1171-2652-2760-3582-localization` until I have approved this issue.** Per [board memory](https://example.invalid) on the prior round-3 reject — no merge until the 8-locale sweep is clean.

### Why this matters

The board already rejected this branch once on [ZAI-138](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-138). Submitting for CEO review with nothing but a delegation summary risks a second reject and burns trust. Use `issue_children_completed` wake to come back here — that is the right resume signal.

Returning to the CTO. Re-submit when the Browser Tester evidence is in.
